title: Altered Pokemon Additions [Cobblemon Addon]
description: An addon for the Altered Pokemon data pack that adds custom moves, abilities and mega stones
body:
**Altered Pokemon get even stronger!**

This is an addon make for the [Altered Pokemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/altered-pokemon) addon, addin in Custom Moves, Abilites and Mega Stones through the use of [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown). **You Will Need Both for This Pack to Work!**


![The Megas Added through the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ff9b30de260a05d61ce83826e7bc84bebd650eb.png)


Here's everythin that this pack adds in!

### Custom Moves:

<details>
<summary>Repture</summary>
  
Type: Ground

Category: Special

Base Power: 70

Acc: 100

Info: A Special Ground move that is able to hit and deal super effective damage to Flying Type Pokemon! Currently only learned by Flygon at Level 36!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Soulblade</summary>
  
Type: Ghost

Category: Physical

Base Power: 75

Acc: 100

Info: Altered Gallade's Signature Move, is able to bypass protect!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Soulblaze</summary>
  
Type: Ghost

Category: Special

Base Power: 75

Acc: 100

Info: Altered Gardevoir's Signature Move, deals both Ghost & Fire type damage!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Twilight Veil</summary>
  
Type: Fairy

Category: Status

Base Power: 0

Acc: 100

Info: Altered Umbreon's Signature Move! The user uses 1/5 of their max HP to set up Aurora Veil. If used under Misty Terrian, the takes no HP to use!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Daybreak Cannon</summary>
  
Type: Fire
  
Category: Special
  
Base Power: 150
  
Acc: 100

Info: Altered Espeon's Signature Move! The user fires a powerful blast that drains the user causin them to recharge the next turn. If used under Harsh Sunlight, the recharge turn is completely skipped!

</details>

### Custom Abilities:

<details>
<summary>Lunar Force</summary>

Info: An Ability for Altered Umbreon! The user's Fiary Type moves get a 1.5x boost and Dark Type moves get a 2x boost when Misty Terrian is Active!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Solar Flare</summary>

Info: An Ability for Altered Espeon! The user's Fire Type moves get a 1.3x boost and Psychic Type moves get a 2x boost when Harsh Sunlight is Active!

Note: The boost for fire is only 1.3x due to fire havin WAY more multiplies
</details>
<details>
<summary>Burning Soul</summary>

Info: An Ability for Altered Mega Gardevoir! It's just Soul Heart with a fancy name xD!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Chilling Glare</summary>

Info: An Ability for Altered Mega Gallade! The user lower the Special Attack of all enemies by 1 on entry! Yup, it's a special version of Intimidate!

</details>

### Custom Mega Evolution
